name: M4A1消音版 | 冒险家乐园
nameZh: M4A1消音版 | 冒险家乐园
descriptionEn: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. This custom paint job features ancient iconography and a golden pit viper before a dusk-tinted jungle background. Strike without warning
descriptionZh: 消音版 M4A1 相对于它那没有消音器的同行来说弹匣更小，枪声也较为“沉默”，还拥有更小的后坐力和更高的精准度。 这把武器使的亮点在于仿旧的图案花纹，在风景如画的背景丛林里隐藏着一条黄金毒蟒。 快速出击！
